g.title: metabib.browse_entry_def_map:def->config.metabib_field:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (def) REFERENCES config.metabib_field(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: metabib.browse_entry_def_map:authority->authority.record_entry:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (authority) REFERENCES authority.record_entry(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
